Upgrade Shop

Equipment Crafting

Item Type Materials Required Craft Check On Failure
Common Equipment2 Wood, 1 Iron Ore3-6Retain 1 material of choice
Rare Equipment2 Iron Ore, 1 Steel Ingot, 1 Plant Fibre4-6Retain 2 materials
Legendary Equipment2 Steel Ingots, 1 Crystal Shard, 1 Legendary Material5-6Retain 3 materials
Mythic Equipment2 Legendary Materials, 1 Mythic Material6Retain all Mythic Materials. Lose 1 non-Mythic material.

Potion Crafting

Potion Tier Materials Required Craft Check
Common Potion1 Plant Fibre, 1 Beast Part3-6
Rare Potion2 Plant Fibres, 1 Moon Blossom4-6
Legendary Potion2 Moon Blossoms, 1 Worldroot Fragment5-6
Mythic Potion2 Legendary Materials, 1 Mythic Material6

Mount Crafting

Mount Tier Materials Required Craft Check
Rare Mount2 Steel Ingots, 1 Beast Part, 1 Crystal Shard5-6
Legendary Mount1 Dragon Scale, 2 Steel Ingots, 1 Crystal Shard6

Armour Set Crafting

Armour Sets are more powerful than standard Equipment and require specialized crafting.

Item Type Materials Required Craft Check On Failure
Set Piece2 Steel Ingots, 1 Crystal Shard, 1 Legendary Material6Retain all Legendary Materials

Relic Crafting

Relics represent some of the rarest treasures in the world.

Item Type Materials Required Craft Check On Failure
Relic2 Ancient Relic Fragments, 1 Void Essence, 1 Mythic Material6Retain all Ancient Relic Fragments

Crafting Station Reference

Crafting Station Allows Crafting Of Automatic Success
CampfirePotionsCommon Crafts
FurnaceWeapons, ArmourRare Crafts
IronworksMounts, Armour SetsLegendary Crafts
SteelworksRelics, Ultimate ComponentsMythic Crafts

Crafting Rules

Crafting Attempt

A Faction that has a Crafting Station constructed or an ally who has a constructed crafting station may spend the required Materials and attempt the listed Craft Check.

Success

Draw 1 card from the appropriate deck.

Failure

Apply the failure effect listed in the Crafting Chart.

Automatic Success

If the Hero is using a Crafting Station whose Passive grants automatic success for that item's tier, no Craft Check is required.
